subcodes.first_line: O thou who journeyest through the lands to serve thy Lord, the Creator of all things! Praise be to God, thou art confirmed and victorious, having spent thy precious life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها السائر فی البلاد لخدمه ربک مالک الایجاد لله الحمد موفق و فائزی عمر گرانمایه را
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude
